question: Which movies released in 1998 have reviews expressing an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie?
trummer_join_predicate: the movie row has year=1998, the review chunk is about the same movie based on movie_id/tconst, and the review expresses an overall negative, critical, or strongly unfavorable opinion of the movie
comparison_contract: Both implementations receive all 50 movie rows and all 50 review rows. Year, movie_id/tconst equality, and negative sentiment are part of the shared semantic predicate.
